caption: A bald man with a gray beard and mustache, wearing a gray polo shirt, stands in front of an exhibition backdrop. In the background, a white poster features the logo "ALPHASZENSOR" and the heading "Typical Gas Sensor Attributes." Blue signs above the poster display text including "ZB38 AlphaSzenzor Inc." and "ZB39 DexMa." As the scene progresses, the man speaks, his mouth opening and closing as he looks toward someone off-camera. He maintains a steady posture, though his facial expressions shift slightly as he talks. To the left of the poster, a black banner with yellow accents is partially visible. The camera remains stationary, focusing on the man's upper body throughout the sequence, capturing his subtle movements and the professional environment of what appears to be a trade show or corporate presentation.
